title: Peninsula Psychology debuts in Dubai's Jumeirah Lake Towers | HealthCare Middle East & Africa - No.1 Health & Pharma Manufacturing Industry Publication
summary: Peninsula Psychology serves adults facing anxiety, depression, burnout, relationship difficulties, eating disorders, grief, and other emotional challenges.
thbAction: Use the article as an entry point to pitch THB's commercial visibility layer for territory planning, account prioritization, and next-best-action for pharma leadership teams.
contentHtml:
UAE—Peninsula Psychology has opened in Jumeirah Lake Towers with a singular vision: mental health care should treat people as connected beings, not isolated cases.

Founder Rita Figueiredo, a clinical psychologist with more than eight years of experience, designed the clinic to make therapy feel accessible and grounded in everyday life.

The clinic’s name reflects this philosophy—a peninsula remains anchored to larger land while shaped by the waters surrounding it, much like how therapy helps clients move from isolation toward connection and clarity.

Figueiredo’s own journey bridges two continents, spanning from Portugal’s Iberian Peninsula to Dubai’s Arabian Peninsula, further grounding the practice’s name in personal meaning.

Clinical expertise meets human care

The clinic combines rigorous, science-based treatment with deeply personal care. Rather than applying one-size-fits-all solutions, therapists tailor each approach to address what lies beneath a client’s concerns.

This commitment to understanding the root of emotional struggles creates lasting change rather than temporary relief.

Figueiredo holds a master’s degree in clinical and health psychology from the University of Lisbon and specialized training in couples and family therapy.

Her postgraduate qualifications in perinatal mental health enable her to support parents through pregnancy, birth, and the transition to parenthood.

As a CDA-licensed psychologist, she brings over a decade of local experience, having worked with more than 100 couples in Dubai.

Flexible support for diverse needs

Peninsula Psychology serves adults facing anxiety, depression, burnout, relationship difficulties, eating disorders, grief, and other emotional challenges.

The clinic operates both individual and couples therapy, with sessions available in-person in Dubai or remotely online.

This flexibility accommodates Dubai’s diverse population—many of whom juggle demanding careers, family obligations, and the pressures of life in a fast-paced international environment.

Clients access the same structured, evidence-based approach regardless of whether they attend sessions face-to-face or online. This commitment to consistent, high-quality care removes barriers that often prevent people from seeking support.

Transparent, professional, and genuinely human

Peninsula Psychology distinguishes itself through transparency and clarity.

The clinic communicates openly about what therapy involves, explains treatment approaches in understandable terms, and sets realistic expectations about the work required.

Sessions follow structured, science-backed methodologies rather than vague or undefined practices.

The clinic operates from the conviction that effective mental health care requires both professional expertise and authentic human warmth.

Figueiredo and her team understand that seeking psychological support represents a significant personal commitment.

They honor this commitment by providing the clinical rigor, personal attention, and genuine care that meaningful change demands.

For those ready to invest time and effort in their well-being, Peninsula Psychology serves as a trusted resource built on evidence, experience, and human connection.
